abilities.name: Hard to Wound +1
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer -.

abilities.name: Fear Not Death
abilities.description: This character's corpse can never be reanimated. May render target remains unfit for reanimation.

actions: (1) Peacebringer (Pistol) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: z10 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/5 damage. Grants + to Intimidate. Capacity 6, Reload 1. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram.
(1) Peacebringer Bayonet (Melee) | AV: 5 (13) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram.
(1) Pine Box (Heavy Melee) | AV: 6 (14) | Rg: y2 or z9 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Crow Get in Box: Trap target, gains Boxed and Buried Condition.
system.notes: One of the few Guild Special Divisions genuinely appreciated by Malifaux citizens. Locate and eliminate Resurrectionists and undead.
